executive_summary: Latest updates from 1 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 1 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: All hell will ‘reign down’: Trump’s 48-hour deadline to Iran over Strait of Horm. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: All hell will ‘reign down’: Trump’s 48-hour deadline to Iran over Strait of Horm
key_developments.detail: US President Donald Trump on Saturday issued a stark warning, reminding Iran that “time is running out” as the April 6 deadline for Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz approaches. key_developments.fullAnalysis: US President Donald Trump on Saturday issued a stark warning, reminding Iran that “time is running out” as the April 6 deadline for Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz approaches. terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
